languages.text: "Инквизитор аф Иррамон действительно недооценил династию фон Валанциус". {n}Изимонд злорадно тянет каждое слово.{/n} "В первый раз — когда решился на штурм дворца. Второй раз — когда решил, что люди Себериана предадут своего господина. И третий..." {n}Он нацеливает на вас плазменный пистолет.{/n} "...когда решил отправить сюда плохо обученного шпиона, не знающего, что семейство Гапрак уже тридцать лет как владеет миром Кьява Гамма!"

"Inquisitor af Irramon has truly underestimated the von Valancius dynasty." {n}Sauerback draws out each word with gloating pleasure.{/n} "Once — when he dared to storm the palace. Twice — when he believed that Seberian's subjects would betray their master. And thrice..." {n}He points the plasma pistol at you.{/n} "...when he decided to send a poorly trained spy, who is apparently unaware that House Gaprak has possessed the world of Kiava Gamma for nigh on thirty years!"
languages.original_text: "Инквизитор аф Иррамон действительно недооценил династию фон Валанциус". {n}Изимонд злорадно тянет каждое слово.{/n} "В первый раз — когда решился на штурм дворца. Второй раз — когда решил, что люди Себериана предадут своего господина. И третий..." {n}Он нацеливает на вас плазменный пистолет.{/n} "...когда решил отправить сюда плохо обученного шпиона, не знающего, что семейство Гапрак уже тридцать лет как владеет миром Кьява Гамма!"

And thrice..." {n}He points the plasma pistol at you.{/n} "...when he decided to send a poorly trained spy, who is apparently unaware that House Gaprak has possessed the world of Kiava Gamma for nigh on thirty years!"

"Inquisitor af Irramon has truly underestimated the von Valancius dynasty." {n}Sauerback draws out each word with gloating pleasure.{/n} "Once — when he dared to storm the palace. Twice — when he believed that Seberian's subjects would betray their master. And thrice..." {n}He points the plasma pistol at you.{/n} "...when he decided to send a poorly trained spy, who is apparently unaware that House Gaprak has possessed the world of Kiava Gamma for nigh on thirty years!"

languages.text: «El Inquisidor af Irramon ha subestimado terriblemente a la dinastía von Valancius». {n}Sauerback se regocija pronunciando esas palabras.{/n} «Primero, cuando intentó asediar el palacio. Después, cuando creyó que los súbditos de Seberian traicionarían a su señor. Y, por último...». {n}Te apunta con la pistola de plasma.{/n} «... ¡Cuando decidió enviar a un{mf||a} espía de pacotilla que ni siquiera sabe que la casa Gaprak lleva casi treinta años en posesión de Kiava Gamma!».
languages.original_text: "Inquisitor af Irramon has truly underestimated the von Valancius dynasty." {n}Sauerback draws out each word with gloating pleasure.{/n} "Once — when he dared to storm the palace. Twice — when he believed that Seberian's subjects would betray their master. And thrice..." {n}He points the plasma pistol at you.{/n} "...when he decided to send a poorly trained spy, who is apparently unaware that House Gaprak has possessed the world of Kiava Gamma for nigh on thirty years!"

traits.locale_text: «El Inquisidor af Irramon ha subestimado terriblemente a la dinastía von Valancius». {n}Sauerback se regocija pronunciando esas palabras.{/n} «Primero, cuando intentó asediar el palacio. Después, cuando creyó que los súbditos de Seberian traicionarían a su señor. Y, por último...». {n}Te apunta con la pistola de plasma.{/n} «... ¡Cuando decidió enviar a un{mf||a} espía de pacotilla que ni siquiera sabe que la casa Gaprak lleva casi treinta años en posesión de Kiava Gamma!».

languages.text: “阿夫·伊拉蒙审判官未免也太小看冯·瓦兰修斯王朝了。”{n}伊西蒙德·苏尔贝克幸灾乐祸地拖长着音调。{/n}“第一次——他胆敢强攻宫殿。第二次——他以为塞贝里安的臣民会背叛他们的主君。而这一次……”{n}他将等离子手枪对准了你。{/n}“……他居然派出了个如此拙劣的间谍，竟然不知道贾帕克家族掌控基亚瓦伽马世界已近三十年！”
languages.original_text: "Inquisitor af Irramon has truly underestimated the von Valancius dynasty." {n}Sauerback draws out each word with gloating pleasure.{/n} "Once — when he dared to storm the palace. Twice — when he believed that Seberian's subjects would betray their master. And thrice..." {n}He points the plasma pistol at you.{/n} "...when he decided to send a poorly trained spy, who is apparently unaware that House Gaprak has possessed the world of Kiava Gamma for nigh on thirty years!"

traits.locale_text: “阿夫·伊拉蒙审判官未免也太小看冯·瓦兰修斯王朝了。”{n}伊西蒙德·苏尔贝克幸灾乐祸地拖长着音调。{/n}“第一次——他胆敢强攻宫殿。第二次——他以为塞贝里安的臣民会背叛他们的主君。而这一次……”{n}他将等离子手枪对准了你。{/n}“……他居然派出了个如此拙劣的间谍，竟然不知道贾帕克家族掌控基亚瓦伽马世界已近三十年！”

languages.text: « L'inquisiteur af Irramon a grandement sous-estimé la dynastie von Valancius. » {n}Sauerback prononce chaque mot avec une jubilation malveillante.{/n} « La première fois, quand il a osé prendre d'assaut le palais. La deuxième, quand il a cru que les sujets de Seberian trahiraient leur maître. Et la troisième... » {n}Il braque sur vous son pistolet à plasma.{/n} « ... quand il a décidé d'envoyer {mf|un espion|une espionne} de seconde zone, qui ne sait même pas que la maison Gaprak possède le monde de Kiava Gamma depuis près de trente ans ! »
languages.original_text: "Inquisitor af Irramon has truly underestimated the von Valancius dynasty." {n}Sauerback draws out each word with gloating pleasure.{/n} "Once — when he dared to storm the palace. Twice — when he believed that Seberian's subjects would betray their master. And thrice..." {n}He points the plasma pistol at you.{/n} "...when he decided to send a poorly trained spy, who is apparently unaware that House Gaprak has possessed the world of Kiava Gamma for nigh on thirty years!"

traits.locale_text: « L'inquisiteur af Irramon a grandement sous-estimé la dynastie von Valancius. » {n}Sauerback prononce chaque mot avec une jubilation malveillante.{/n} « La première fois, quand il a osé prendre d'assaut le palais. La deuxième, quand il a cru que les sujets de Seberian trahiraient leur maître. Et la troisième... » {n}Il braque sur vous son pistolet à plasma.{/n} « ... quand il a décidé d'envoyer {mf|un espion|une espionne} de seconde zone, qui ne sait même pas que la maison Gaprak possède le monde de Kiava Gamma depuis près de trente ans ! »

languages.text: "Engizisyoncu af İrramon, von Valancius hanedanlığını gerçekten hafife almış." {n}Sauerback, her kelimeyi keyifle uzatarak söylüyor.{/n} "İlkinde saraya saldırmaya cesaret etti. İkincisinde Seberian'ın tebaasının efendilerine ihanet edeceğine inandı. Üçüncüsündeyse..." {n}Plazma tabancasını sana doğrultuyor.{/n} "Gaprak Hanesi'nin neredeyse otuz yıldır Kiava Gama dünyasına sahip olduğundan habersiz görünen, yetersiz eğitimli bir casus gönderdi!"
languages.original_text: "Inquisitor af Irramon has truly underestimated the von Valancius dynasty." {n}Sauerback draws out each word with gloating pleasure.{/n} "Once — when he dared to storm the palace. Twice — when he believed that Seberian's subjects would betray their master. And thrice..." {n}He points the plasma pistol at you.{/n} "...when he decided to send a poorly trained spy, who is apparently unaware that House Gaprak has possessed the world of Kiava Gamma for nigh on thirty years!"

traits.locale_text: "Engizisyoncu af İrramon, von Valancius hanedanlığını gerçekten hafife almış." {n}Sauerback, her kelimeyi keyifle uzatarak söylüyor.{/n} "İlkinde saraya saldırmaya cesaret etti. İkincisinde Seberian'ın tebaasının efendilerine ihanet edeceğine inandı. Üçüncüsündeyse..." {n}Plazma tabancasını sana doğrultuyor.{/n} "Gaprak Hanesi'nin neredeyse otuz yıldır Kiava Gama dünyasına sahip olduğundan habersiz görünen, yetersiz eğitimli bir casus gönderdi!"

languages.text: "Inquisitor af Irramon hat die Dynastie derer von Valancius in der Tat unterschätzt." {n}Sauerback stößt jedes Wort mit hämischer Freude aus.{/n} "Einmal — als er es wagte, den Palast zu stürmen. Ein zweites Mal ... als er glaubte, Seberians Subjekte würden ihren Meister verraten. Und ein drittes Mal ..." {n}Er richtet die Plasmapistole auf dich.{/n} "... als er beschloss, einen schlecht ausgebildeten Spitzel zu schicken, der offenbar nicht weiß, dass Kiava Gamma fast dreißig Jahre lang im Besitz von Haus Gaprak war!"
languages.original_text: "Inquisitor af Irramon has truly underestimated the von Valancius dynasty." {n}Sauerback draws out each word with gloating pleasure.{/n} "Once — when he dared to storm the palace. Twice — when he believed that Seberian's subjects would betray their master. And thrice..." {n}He points the plasma pistol at you.{/n} "...when he decided to send a poorly trained spy, who is apparently unaware that House Gaprak has possessed the world of Kiava Gamma for nigh on thirty years!"

traits.locale_text: "Inquisitor af Irramon hat die Dynastie derer von Valancius in der Tat unterschätzt." {n}Sauerback stößt jedes Wort mit hämischer Freude aus.{/n} "Einmal — als er es wagte, den Palast zu stürmen. Ein zweites Mal ... als er glaubte, Seberians Subjekte würden ihren Meister verraten. Und ein drittes Mal ... {n}Er richtet die Plasmapistole auf dich.{/n} "... als er beschloss, einen schlecht ausgebildeten Spitzel zu schicken, der offenbar nicht weiß, dass Kiava Gamma fast dreißig Jahre lang im Besitz von Haus Gaprak war!"

languages.text: 「イラモンの審問官は、フォン・ヴァランキウス家の力を過小評価した。」{n}サウアーバックは満足げに言葉をゆっくりと口にする。{/n}「一度は宮殿を襲撃した時。二度目はシベリアンの臣下たちが主を裏切ると信じた時。そして三度…」{n}彼はプラズマピストルをあなたに向ける。{/n}「彼が訓練不足のスパイを送り込んだ時。彼は、ギャプラク家がキアヴァ・ガンマの世界を30年近く支配していることを知らないらしい。」
languages.original_text: "Inquisitor af Irramon has truly underestimated the von Valancius dynasty." {n}Sauerback draws out each word with gloating pleasure.{/n} "Once — when he dared to storm the palace. Twice — when he believed that Seberian's subjects would betray their master. And thrice..." {n}He points the plasma pistol at you.{/n} "...when he decided to send a poorly trained spy, who is apparently unaware that House Gaprak has possessed the world of Kiava Gamma for nigh on thirty years!"
